subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the Desired One, Who through the Finger of His Will hath set in motion the heavens of the Kingdom of utterance and by His Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که باصبع اراده اش افلاک ملکوت بیان متحرک و بکلمه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @consolation and comfort, @Word of God and human limitations, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar]
